description: Returns the Checklist Schedules from Checklists (Inspections) on the Project

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: filters[inspection_type_id]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified Checklist Type IDs

parameters.name: filters[frequency]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified Frequency Types

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified Location IDs

parameters.name: filters[list_template_id]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified Inspection Template IDs

parameters.name: filters[assignee_id]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified Assignee IDs

parameters.name: filters[first_inspection_due_at]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified First Inspection Due Date

parameters.name: filters[ends_at]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified Last Inspection Due Date.

parameters.name: filters[ended]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) that are finished when true, returns unfinished schedule(s) otherwise

parameters.name: filters[equipment_id]
parameters.description: Return schedule(s) with the specified Equipment IDs

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort schedule(s) by the chosen param; check below for a list of options. The direction of sorting is ascending by default; for descending sort, insert the - symbol before the param.

first_inspection_due_at.description: Due at timestamp of first inspection

ends_at.description: Due at timestamp of last inspection

next_due_at.description: Due at timestamp of next inspection to be created

total_inspections_scheduled.description: Total amount of inpections that will be created

items.description: User IDs assigned to the schedule

responsible_contractor_id.description: ID of Vendor responsible for the work being inspected
